title: Sentinel Shield redaction report
description: Machine-readable summary produced by scripts/lib/redaction.sh (rd_report_json / rd_scan_paths). It records the sensitive-value registry's bounded state and the result of screening produced artifacts for CONFIRMED, high-confidence credential shapes before they are displayed, persisted, or uploaded. It carries COUNTS, CATEGORY names, and bound metadata ONLY — it NEVER contains a secret value, a raw token, a path, an email, or any redacted content. confirmed_secret_present=true means at least one artifact carried a confirmed secret and release readiness MUST fail closed. The categories[] enum is kept in lockstep with rd_scan_categories; tests/prod/253-redaction-security.sh cross-checks the two so the enum can never drift from the code.

schema.description: Fixed discriminator for this report shape.

generated_at.description: Optional ISO-8601 UTC time the report was produced.

sensitive_values.description: Bounded state of the LITERAL sensitive-value registry. Counts only.

registered.description: Number of literal secret values currently registered for redaction.

capped.description: True when at least one value was REFUSED for exceeding a bound (count/size/min-length) — the registry never silently truncates a value into a partial match.

cap_count.description: The maximum number of literal values the registry will hold (RD_MAX_SECRETS).

cap_bytes.description: The maximum byte-length of a single registered value (RD_MAX_SECRET_BYTES).

categories.description: The CLOSED set of high-confidence credential categories the artifact scanner screens for. A match in any is a CONFIRMED secret.

scan.description: Aggregate result of the artifact scan. Counts only — no filenames, no values.

files_with_secrets.description: Number of files that carried at least one confirmed secret.

total_findings.description: Total confirmed-secret match lines across all files and categories.

by_category.description: Per-category confirmed-match counts. Keys are drawn from categories[]; values are non-negative integers. Absent categories mean zero.

confirmed_secret_present.description: True iff total_findings > 0. When true, the produced artifact carries a confirmed secret and release readiness MUST fail closed (the scanner returns non-zero).
